title: Receptionist
description:
Job Description:

  • Manage front desk operations, including attending to visitors, handling telephone inquiries, and relaying messages to relevant staff
  • Provide basic care to sick or injured students and promptly inform parents/guardians when necessary
  • Perform data entry and administrative support for various school functions
  • Maintain accurate records for lost and found items, sick bay usage, student incidents, and early release cases
  • Issue, track, and ensure the timely return of uniforms on loan to students
  • Maintain stationery and paper inventory, including stock monitoring and replenishment
  • Keep the front desk and General Office areas neat, organized, and professional at all times
  • Manage cupboards for stationery and uniforms to ensure an efficient and tidy working environment
  • Distribute incoming mail and items to designated recipients in a timely manner
  • Inform teachers of deliveries and ensure items are properly cleared and collected
  • Issue report books and graduation certificates to students as required
  • Contact students for ad-hoc NRIC collection and related administrative follow-ups
  • Assist in packing and organizing items by class for distribution
  • Support document preparation, including lamination and binding
  • Update staff name labels for new and existing staff
  • Perform other general administrative duties as assigned by school management

Requirements:

  •  At least 5 GCE O-Level passes
  • A minimum of 3 years of reception duties experience or equivalent
  • At least 3 years of experience using Microsoft Excel and Microsoft Word

postedCompany.description:
Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based QEHS consulting firm established by a team of experienced professionals committed to delivering comprehensive Environment, Workplace Safety & Health, and Quality solutions to organisations across various sectors.

Alongside our strong capabilities in QHSE Management System Auditing, Consulting, Outsourcing and Training, we also provide a wide range of manpower support services to meet the operational needs of industries in Singapore.

Our manpower services cover the deployment of qualified and experienced personnel, including:

  • WSH Officers, WSH Coordinators, ECOs, Safety Supervisors, Fire Safety personnel

  • Technical staff, Operations support staff

  • Receptionists, Administrative Executives, Customer Service personnel

  • Teachers, Student Care staff, Early Childhood assistants

  • Lab Assistants, Science/Technical support staff

  • Logistics, Warehouse, Production, and Field Support manpower

  • Other specialised manpower based on project requirements

With a team that brings together global expertise and strong local industry experience, Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd ensures clients receive reliable, cost-effective, and practical solutions that support compliance, enhance productivity, and promote workplace excellence.

We remain dedicated to delivering high-quality consulting services and dependable manpower support, helping organisations operate safely, efficiently, and successfully in today’s challenging business environment.
postedCompany.name: DYNAMIC SAFETY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D15 Katong, Joo Chiat, Amber Road
